summary: - [Simple File Creation](USE_CASE_SIMPLE_TASK.md) - Standard chat interactions. - [Iterative Refactoring](USE_CASE_ITERATIVE_REFACTOR.md) - Continuous debugging and improvement loops. - [Mediated Execution](USE_CASE_MEDIATED_EXECUTION.md) - Human-in-the-loop Darwinian evolution. - [Self-Development](USE_CASE_SELF_DEVELOPMENT.md) - The system improving its own architecture. - Conflict resolution between authorities. - Feedback-driven trajectory improvement. - Local fallback when remote services fail.
